Nero, as Augustus (AD 54-68). AV aureus (18mm, 7.11 gm, 5h). NGC Choice Fine 5/5 - 2/5, ex-jewelry. Rome, AD 65-66. NERO CAESAR-AVGVSTVS, laureate head of Nero right / SALVS, Salus seated left on high-backed throne, patera in outstretched right hand, left arm resting at side. Calicó 443. RIC I 59. 

Nero, born Lucius Domitius Ahenobarbus in 37 AD, ascended to the Roman imperial throne in 54 AD, initiating a tumultuous reign that both captivated and horrified contemporaries. Initially ...

sales.description:
Ancients
Otho (15 January-16 April AD 69). AV aureus (20mm, 7.18 gm, 7h). NGC VF 5/5 - 4/5, Fine Style. Rome. IMP M OTHO CAESAR AVG TR P, bare, bewigged, draped bust of Otho right, seen from behind / SECVRI-TAS P R, Securitas standing facing, head left, wreath in outstretched right hand, scepter cradled in left arm. RIC I 7. Calicó 532 (same dies). A lifelike Fine Style portrait.
